backstory.original: A proud daughter of Clan Undurr and a devout follower of Gorm Gulthyn, the dwarven god of vigilance and duty. She spent fifteen years in the city of Ironmaster, in Icewind Dale, overseeing and protecting her family's investment in the city's lucrative mining operations. However, she saw little action and feared that her talents were being squandered. She has recently found a home within a budding organization called the Order of the Gauntlet, which vigilantly guards against the rise of evil in all its forms.
backstory.display: 她是恩杜尔家族的骄傲，也是矮人的警戒和职责之神贡姆·葛辛的虔诚信徒。她在冰风谷的精铁城待了 15 年，监督并保护她家族在该城利润丰厚的采矿投资。然而她在那里没有用武之地，因此开始担心自己的才能会被浪费。她最近加入了一个新成立的组织，这个组织被称为铁手教团，他们警惕地防范着各种形式的邪恶崛起。

description.original: Barrowin smashes the nearest enemy with her mighty warhammer.
description.display: 布朗温用她的强力战锤猛击距离最近的敌人。

description.original: Barrowin infuses herself with holy energy, shielding and buffing her attack cooldown.
description.display: 布朗温为自己注入神圣能量，获得护盾并降低攻击冷却时间。

longDescription.original: Barrowin infuses herself with holy energy, shielding allies in her column and decreasing her own attack cooldown by 2 seconds.
longDescription.display: 布朗温为自己注入神圣能量，为她所在列的同伴提供护盾，并使自己的攻击冷却时间降低 2 秒。

description.original: Barrowin causes adjacent Champions to do additional damage whenever she attacks.
description.display: 每当布朗温攻击时，使相邻的勇士能造成额外伤害。

description.original: Barrowin heals Champions in the same column as her whenever she attacks.
description.display: 每当布朗温攻击时，治疗与她同列的勇士。

description.desc: Barrowin increases the damage of Champions behind her by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation who has an equal or higher base attack cooldown, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每位基本攻击冷却时间多于等于布朗温的勇士，均使她身后勇士的伤害提高 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Barrowin causes Champions behind her to do additional damage based on the number of Champions in the formation with equal or higher attack speed than her.
tipText.display: 依据阵型中攻击速度高于等于自己的勇士数量，布朗温使位于她身后的勇士造成额外伤害。

description.desc: Barrowin has a number of Vigilance stacks equal to the number of Champions in the formation that are either lawful or dwarves. She increases the health of other Champions in the formation by $amount% of her max health for each Vigilance stack.
布朗温的“警戒”堆叠层数相当于阵型中的守序或矮人勇士数量。每层“警戒”均使阵型中其他勇士的生命值提高她的最大生命值的 $amount%。

Barrowin heals Champions in her column, including herself, for $(not_buffed amount) health per second for each stack of Vigilance she has. After Barrowin attacks, her next Healing Word also applies a temporary health bonus of the same amount.
每层“警戒”堆叠均使布朗温每秒为同列勇士（包括她自己）治疗 $(not_buffed amount) 点生命值。布朗温攻击后，她的下一个“治愈真言”也会施加等量的临时生命值加成。

tipText.original: Barrowin heals Champions in the same column as her. Place her in a column that takes a lot of damage!
tipText.display: 布朗温治疗与她同纵队的勇士。将她放置在承受大量伤害的纵队里！

description.desc: Barrowin attacks $amount seconds faster for each stack of Vigilance she has. Additionally, when a Champion that is eligible for Healing Word is hit by an enemy, Barrowin attacks 1 second faster for her next two attacks.
每层“警戒”堆叠均使布朗温的攻击速度加快 $amount 秒。此外，当一名能作为“治愈真言”施放对象的勇士被敌人击中时，布朗温的下两次攻击速度提升 1 秒。
Barrowin remembers the largest number of enemies she's had to tank at once in the current area. Blessed Hammer is increased by $amount% multiplied by that number.
布朗温铭记她在当前区域应对的最大敌人数量。“祝福之锤”按此数值以乘数强化 $amount%。
Barrowin's Blessed Hammer is buffed by $amount%
布朗温的“祝福之锤”强化 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Barrowin's Blessed Hammer is more effective, causing her allies to do even more damage.
specializationDescription.display: 布朗温的祝福之锤效果加强，使她的盟友造成更高伤害。

description.desc: Barrowin's Healing Word is buffed by $amount%
布朗温的“治愈真言”强化 $amount%

specializationDescription.original: Barrowin's Healing Word is more effective, causing her to heal and shield for even more.
specializationDescription.display: 布朗温的治愈真言效果加强，使她提供更有效的治疗和护盾。

description.desc: Barrowin's Blessed Hammer base effect is additively increased by $(amount_per_stack)% for each Vigilance stack she has.
每层“警戒”堆叠均使布朗温的“祝福之锤”基础效果以加算方式强化 $(amount_per_stack)%。

specializationDescription.original: Barrowin focuses on lawful and dwarf Champions, boosting Blessed Hammer based on the number of Vigilance stacks she has.
specializationDescription.display: 布朗温专注于守序和矮人勇士，依据她堆叠的“警戒”层数来强化祝福之锤。

description.original: The light illuminates you, friend.
description.display: 光明照耀着你，朋友。

description.original: Gorm's light shines upon us all.
description.display: 贡姆的圣光照耀着我们所有人。

description.original: You need heals? Get over here, then!
description.display: 你需要治疗？赶紧过来！

description.original: Feel the blessing of Gorm course through you.
description.display: 感受贡姆的祝福穿过你的身体。

description.original: You think yourself weak? Think again!
description.display: 你觉得自己很弱？再想想！

description.original: I can stand with the best of them!
description.display: 我能比肩他们中的最强者！

description.original: You'd think my hammer slow. You'd be mistaken.
description.display: 你要是觉得我的铁锤速度慢，那你就错了。

description.original: It's a prayer to Gorm Gulthyn.
description.display: 这是对贡姆·古辛的祈祷。

description.original: Undurr Ground. Get it?
description.display: 翁铎在地下。听明白了吗？

description.original: Clan Undurr does not back down!
description.display: 翁铎部落永不退缩！

description.original: I used to do these calculations at home all the time!
description.display: 我以前一直在家里做这些计算！

description.original: Rally under the banner of Clan Undurr!
description.display: 在恩杜尔家族的旗帜下集结！

description.original: Don't go dying on me now. Plenty of work to do.
description.display: 先别急着断气。还有大把活儿要干呢。

description.original: Still sturdy enough to cause damage, if ye know what yer doin'.
description.display: 只要技术熟稔，依然可以发挥出它的威力。

description.original: A hammer's just a chunk o' iron 'til it's in the hands of a proper warrior.
description.display: 在普通人手中锤子就只是一坨废铁，在战士手中它才是真正的大杀器。

description.original: The last thing me enemies see before Gorm takes 'em.
description.display: 在回归贡姆怀抱前它将是定格在我敌人眼中的最后画面。

description.original: A beacon of hope for all who see its mighty swing. Enemies not included, of course.
description.display: 所有见识过它的威力的人都会感到热血沸腾。当然，被它击中的敌人除外。

description.original: A sad thing, but it's nice to have somethin' to follow.
description.display: 真可惜了，不过有旗子总好过没有。

description.original: As durable as the Order of the Gauntlet itself.
description.display: 就跟铁手教团一样老当益壮。

description.original: Brings a tear to me eye seein' it flap in the wind.
description.display: 看着它随风飘扬我顿时热泪盈眶。

description.original: The Order is my home now. I shall follow them to the end o' time.
description.display: 教团现在是我的家了。我会追随着它到时间尽头。

description.original: Even the craggiest chunk of brass can have great meaning.
description.display: 哪怕是最不起眼的一坨黄铜都可以拥有不凡的象征意义。

description.original: There was a time that I dinnae know what this symbol meant.
description.display: 我曾经对这个圣徽非常陌生。

description.original: In me time of need, Gorm has been a shining beacon of hope.
description.display: 在我最无助的时刻，贡姆成了我黑夜中的明灯。

name.display: 贡姆的忠诚黄金护身符

description.original: Gorm Gulthyn himself has chosen me as his emissary, of this I am sure.
description.display: 贡姆·古辛选中了我作为祂的使者。我非常确定。

description.original: Protects me waist and me legs! A little on the heavy side, though.
description.display: 可以保护我的腰和腿。虽然是有点过于沉重。

description.original: Yer gonna need a strong blow to get through this.
description.display: 唯有非一般力度的攻击才能击穿此腰带。

description.original: I was thinkin' one day, what haven't I plated in gold yet? Then I looked down.
description.display: 有一次我忽然想到自己身上怎么就没有半点镀金装备，然后我就低头瞄了一下。

name.original: Shining Belt of the Devout Cleric

description.original: It is my solemn duty to aid those in need and defend those who cannae defend themselves.
description.display: 拯救落难和无助的人是我的庄重的使命。

description.original: I'm one tough dwarf to crack.
description.display: 我是非一般坚硬的矮人。

description.original: Ye can never have enough gold on yer armor, ye know.
description.display: 没有人会排斥自己身上护甲的含金量。

description.original: A masterfully crafted breastplate, if I ever saw one.
description.display: 绝对称得上是大师级质量的胸甲。

description.original: Perhaps a little over the top, yea, but if it causes just one enemy to pause, it's done its job.
description.display: 虽说是有点过量了，但是数量如此惊人的宝石绝对会让战场上的敌人看傻眼，哪怕只换来一刹那的机也值得了。

description.original: The old helm of my beloved, Storn Skulldark.
description.display: 这是我的好朋友斯托恩·颅暗使用过的头盔。

description.original: Granted to me by the Order of the Gauntlet when I joined their ranks.
description.display: 这是在我加入铁手教团时获赠的装备。

description.original: Dinnae worry about me, it's reinforced with good dwarven steel.
description.display: 不必担心，这头盔是采用优良的矮人钢铁打造的。

description.original: Granted only to the Order's most devout and effective followers.
description.display: 只有教团中最虔诚最杰出的追随者才有资格佩戴此头盔。

effects.description: Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation
Increases the damage of all Female Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Dwarf Champions by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions with a CON score of 11 or higher by $(amount)%
Increases the damage of all Champions by $(amount)% for each Champion with a DEX score of 11 or higher in the formation
Increases the damage of all Lawful Champions by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: A proud daughter of Clan Undurr and a devout follower of Gorm Gulthyn, the dwarven god of vigilance and duty. She spent fifteen years in the city of Ironmaster, in Icewind Dale, overseeing and protecting her family's investment in the city's lucrative mining operations. However, she saw little action and feared that her talents were being squandered. She has recently found a home within a budding organization called the Order of the Gauntlet, which vigilantly guards against the rise of evil in all its forms.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Barrowin grants bonus damage to adjacent Champions whenever she attacks. She also heals Champions in the same column as her.

event_upgrades.name: Blessed Hammer
event_upgrades.description: Barrowin causes adjacent Champions to do additional damage whenever she attacks.

event_upgrades.name: Healing Word
event_upgrades.description: Barrowin heals Champions in the same column as her whenever she attacks.

display.name: 从容应对
display.description: 翁铎部落永不退缩！

original.name: Scholar

display.name: 学者
display.description: 我以前一直在家里做这些计算！

original.name: Prodigal Leader

display.name: 浪荡首领
display.description: 在恩杜尔家族的旗帜下集结！

original.name: Wound Master

display.name: 疗伤大师
display.description: 先别急着断气。还有大把活儿要干呢。

original.name: Cracked Hammer
original.description: Still sturdy enough to cause damage, if ye know what yer doin'.

display.name: 破裂之锤
display.description: 只要技术熟稔，依然可以发挥出它的威力。

original.name: Stout Hammer
original.description: A hammer's just a chunk o' iron 'til it's in the hands of a proper warrior.

display.name: 结实之锤
display.description: 在普通人手中锤子就只是一坨废铁，在战士手中它才是真正的大杀器。

original.name: Shining Hammer
original.description: The last thing me enemies see before Gorm takes 'em.

display.name: 闪亮之锤
display.description: 在回归贡姆怀抱前它将是定格在我敌人眼中的最后画面。

original.name: Golden Hammer of Clan Undurr
original.description: A beacon of hope for all who see its mighty swing. Enemies not included, of course.

display.name: 翁铎部落的黄金锤
display.description: 所有见识过它的威力的人都会感到热血沸腾。当然，被它击中的敌人除外。

original.name: Ratty Banner
original.description: A sad thing, but it's nice to have somethin' to follow.

display.name: 破烂的旗帜
display.description: 真可惜了，不过有旗子总好过没有。

original.name: Durable Banner
original.description: As durable as the Order of the Gauntlet itself.

display.name: 耐久的旗帜
display.description: 就跟铁手教团一样老当益壮。

original.name: Waving Banner
original.description: Brings a tear to me eye seein' it flap in the wind.

display.name: 飘扬的旗帜
display.description: 看着它随风飘扬我顿时热泪盈眶。

original.name: Order of the Gauntlet Banner
original.description: The Order is my home now. I shall follow them to the end o' time.

display.name: 铁手教团旗帜
display.description: 教团现在是我的家了。我会追随着它到时间尽头。

original.name: Dull Brass Symbol
original.description: Even the craggiest chunk of brass can have great meaning.

display.name: 暗淡的黄铜圣徽
display.description: 哪怕是最不起眼的一坨黄铜都可以拥有不凡的象征意义。

original.name: Dwarf-Forged Symbol
original.description: There was a time that I dinnae know what this symbol meant.

display.name: 矮人铸造的圣徽
display.description: 我曾经对这个圣徽非常陌生。

original.name: Symbol of Gorm
original.description: In me time of need, Gorm has been a shining beacon of hope.

display.name: 贡姆圣徽
display.description: 在我最无助的时刻，贡姆成了我黑夜中的明灯。

original.name: Faithful Golden Amulet of Gorm
original.description: Gorm Gulthyn himself has chosen me as his emissary, of this I am sure.

display.name: 贡姆的忠诚黄金护身符
display.description: 贡姆·古辛选中了我作为祂的使者。我非常确定。

original.name: Heavy Belt
original.description: Protects me waist and me legs! A little on the heavy side, though.

display.name: 沉重的腰带
display.description: 可以保护我的腰和腿。虽然是有点过于沉重。

original.name: Iron Plated Belt
original.description: Yer gonna need a strong blow to get through this.

display.name: 铁板腰带
display.description: 唯有非一般力度的攻击才能击穿此腰带。

original.name: Gold Plated Belt
original.description: I was thinkin' one day, what haven't I plated in gold yet? Then I looked down.

display.name: 镀金腰带
display.description: 有一次我忽然想到自己身上怎么就没有半点镀金装备，然后我就低头瞄了一下。

original.name: Shining Belt of the Devout Cleric
original.description: It is my solemn duty to aid those in need and defend those who cannae defend themselves.

display.name: 虔诚牧师的闪亮腰带
display.description: 拯救落难和无助的人是我的庄重的使命。

original.name: Steel Breastplate
original.description: I'm one tough dwarf to crack.

display.name: 钢质胸甲
display.description: 我是非一般坚硬的矮人。

original.name: Ornate Breastplate
original.description: Ye can never have enough gold on yer armor, ye know.

display.name: 华丽的胸甲
display.description: 没有人会排斥自己身上护甲的含金量。

original.name: Gemmed Breastplate
original.description: A masterfully crafted breastplate, if I ever saw one.

display.name: 镶宝石的胸甲
display.description: 绝对称得上是大师级质量的胸甲。

original.name: Bejewelled Breastplate of Dwarves
original.description: Perhaps a little over the top, yea, but if it causes just one enemy to pause, it's done its job.

display.name: 矮人族宝石胸甲
display.description: 虽说是有点过量了，但是数量如此惊人的宝石绝对会让战场上的敌人看傻眼，哪怕只换来一刹那的机也值得了。

original.name: Used Helmet
original.description: The old helm of my beloved, Storn Skulldark.

display.name: 二手头盔
display.description: 这是我的好朋友斯托恩·颅暗使用过的头盔。

original.name: New Helmet
original.description: Granted to me by the Order of the Gauntlet when I joined their ranks.

display.name: 崭新头盔
display.description: 这是在我加入铁手教团时获赠的装备。

original.name: Jewelled Helmet
original.description: Dinnae worry about me, it's reinforced with good dwarven steel.

display.name: 宝石头盔
display.description: 不必担心，这头盔是采用优良的矮人钢铁打造的。

original.name: Brilliant Helmet of the Order
original.description: Granted only to the Order's most devout and effective followers.

display.name: 教团的灿烂头盔
display.description: 只有教团中最虔诚最杰出的追随者才有资格佩戴此头盔。
